---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea (new framework scanner, auth scheme, adapter, …)
labels: enhancement
---

**What's missing / what would you like**
A clear description of the capability.

**Use case**
What project/stack are you trying to connect? (framework, auth scheme)

**Notes**
For new scanners/auth detectors, link to docs or a small example of the
route/auth pattern if you can — it makes implementation much faster.
